title: Graham Steadman
description: Professional RL coach & former GB international rugby league footballer
extract:
Graham Steadman (born 8 December 1961) is an English professional rugby league coach who is the head coach of the Newcastle Thunder in the RFL Championship and an assistant coach at the York Knights in the Super League.
He is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s and 1990s, and coached in the 2000s. He played at representative level for Great Britain and Yorkshire, and at club level for York Wasps, Featherstone Rovers, Gold Coast-Tweed Giants and Castleford, as a goal-kicking fullback or stand-off, and coached at club level for the Castleford Tigers.
